title: New HyperCard discovery: Neuromancer / Count Zero / Mona Lisa Overdrive
full_text:
This page is a wiki. Please login or create an account to begin editing.
 
 
 .

Neuromancer / Count Zero / Mona Lisa Overdrive

Voyager Expanded Book (EB15)

Neuromancer/Count Zero/Mona Lisa Overdrive

by William Gibson

This Voyager Expanded Books edition contains William Gibson's Sprawl Trilogy--Neuromancer (1984), Count Zero (1986), and Mona Lisa Overdrive (1988). Also, it contains an afterword by the author that hasn't been republished elsewhere (but copies of it have been circulating online for some time).

"The Expanded Books Project was a project by The Voyager Company during 1991, that investigated how a book could be presented on a computer screen in a way that would be both familiar and useful to regular book readers. The project focused on perfecting font choice, font size, line spacing, margin notes, book marks, and other publishing details to work in digital format." - from the Expanded Books Wikipedia Entry

Installation instructions:

1. Mount Gibson.dmg.

2. Run "READ ME FIRST" for instructions and compatibility information.

3. Run "Gibson.sea," navigate to your hard disk in the window that opens, and click "Save."

4. Open your hard disk and then open the new folder there named "Gibson."

5. Copy "EB Fonts" to your System folder.

6. Run "The Library" to open the Expanded Books (note: the novels are listed in alphabetical order instead of chronological order).
Compatibility

 Architecture: 68k

System Requirements: Designed especially for Macintosh PowerBooks, or any Mac with hard drive and large display (640x400 or greater). System 6.0.7 and HyperCard 2.1 (or later versions). Shipped on 1.4 MB high density floppy.

The screenshots above were made using Basilisk II for Windows (26-01-2022 build) and Macintosh System 7.5.5.
